description:
Doing great works is not based on what you do; it's based on what you believe. It’s not so much about what you believe; it’s about Whom you believe.  Jesus wasn't a man who became anointed; He is God from the very beginning, the God of the very God. Having an accurate knowledge of Jesus is a prerequisite for great exploits


Preacher: Dr Mensa Otabil
Sermon Title: The Knowledge Of Jesus
Service: COZA 12DG 2026 Day 5, Morning Session  (January 6th, 2026) 



____________________________________




Pastor Biodun Fatoyinbo is the Global Senior Pastor of The Commonwealth of Zion Assembly (COZA):

who will re-establish God's kingdom on earth and inform the nations adequately.
